name: Ridgeline v1
description: First public release of Ridgeline - self-hosted read-it-later for developers. Auth, bookmark capture, tagging, and the React/Tailwind reading UI deployed to the homelab Kubernetes cluster at ridgelinesystems.com.

name: Ridgeline API
description: Go REST + JSON API powering Ridgeline - bookmarks CRUD, tag system, Algolia search, Stripe billing webhooks, and the Ridgeline Digest newsletter export. PostgreSQL backed.

name: Glanceboard MVP
description: Minimum viable homelab status and uptime dashboard at glanceboard.app. Service health checks, incident timeline, and a lightweight status page. Issues mirrored from the GitLab repo.

name: Ridgeline Web Redesign
description: Refresh of the Ridgeline reading UI - new tag browser, keyboard shortcuts, dark mode, and a faster article reader built in React + Tailwind.

name: Ridgeline CLI 0.3
description: Go command-line client for Ridgeline - capture, list, and tag bookmarks from the terminal plus a local sync cache. Distributed via Homebrew tap.

name: Ridgeline Search v2
description: Search overhaul for Ridgeline - Algolia index restructuring, typo tolerance, faceted tag filtering, and a Postgres full-text fallback for self-hosters without Algolia.

name: Ridgeline Billing
description: Stripe billing for hosted Ridgeline - subscription plans, webhook handling, proration, and dunning emails for failed payments.

name: Ridgeline Digest
description: Weekly Ridgeline Digest newsletter - curated picks exported from the app, templated, and sent through Mailchimp to the audience at ridgelinesystems.com.

name: Ridgeline Docs Site
description: Self-hosting guides, API reference, and changelog for Ridgeline built as a static docs site and deployed to docs.ridgelinesystems.com.

name: Ridgeline Mobile (alpha)
description: Early React Native client for Ridgeline - offline reading, share-sheet capture on iOS and Android, and background sync. Mostly exploratory.

name: Glanceboard Agent
description: Go agent that runs on each homelab node and pushes CPU, memory, disk, and service health metrics to the Glanceboard dashboard over a lightweight gRPC stream.

name: Homelab K8s Upgrade
description: Upgrade the homelab Kubernetes cluster to the latest minor, migrate ingress to the gateway API, and move workloads onto local-path storage with scheduled snapshots.

name: Homelab Observability
description: Prometheus, Grafana, and Loki stack for the homelab - dashboards for node health, alerting rules, and log aggregation feeding into Glanceboard.

name: pg-migrate v1.0
description: Stabilize the pg-migrate library - up/down migrations, embedded SQL, transactional batches, and a clean public API ready to tag v1.0.

name: s3-backup v1.0
description: Cron-driven backups of Postgres and homelab volumes to S3-compatible storage with retention policies, integrity checks, and restore tooling.

name: go-worker-pool v1.0
description: Bounded worker-pool library with context cancellation, panic recovery, and metrics hooks. Extracted from Ridgeline's background job runner.

name: go-lru-cache v1.0
description: Generic, concurrency-safe LRU cache with TTL eviction and size bounds, benchmarked against the standard map approaches. Used to cache Ridgeline metadata.

name: raft-kv Learning Build
description: Hand-rolled Raft consensus and a small distributed key-value store in Go - leader election, log replication, and snapshotting as a learning exercise.

name: Dotfiles Refresh
description: Reorganize personal dotfiles - Neovim Lua config, zsh setup, tmux, and a bootstrap script for new machines and homelab nodes.

name: go-snippets Benchmarks
description: Microbenchmark suite for go-snippets - compare concurrency patterns, channel vs mutex, and allocation behavior across recent Go releases.
